articles.author: Courtenay Brown
articles.title: March inflation soars, confirming Iran war price shock - Axios
articles.description: The first inflation report of the war era captures the higher costs Americans faced last month.
articles.content:
By the numbers: In the 12 months through March, CPI was 3.3%, the highest since May 2024, the Labor Department said Friday. The comparable measure for February was 2.4%.
Yes, but: Excluding energy a… [+1110 chars]
